title: contact_query: position+limit i64 overflow panics daemon in debug builds
description: Trigger: authenticated user sends ChatContact/query with position=9223372036854775806, limit=2. At daemon/src/jmap.rs:638 the expression (position + limit) as usize overflows i64 before the .min() clamp. In debug builds this panics and kills the daemon process. In release builds i64 wraps to a large usize which .min(ids.len()) clamps correctly, but the response returns wrong data. The negative-value guard at line 634 catches one class of bad input but misses overflow. Fix: use position.saturating_add(limit) or cap each value to ids.len() before adding.
